name: Rogue R2: Cunning Escape Artist — All 3 Cunning Actions + Uncanny Dodge
description: Level 5 Thief Rogue Lyra fights a Bandit Captain (Multiattack, 2x Scimitar) and a Bandit across 4 rounds. Tests all three Cunning Action variants: Disengage (R1 bonus after attack), Hide leading to Sneak Attack via advantage (R2 bonus before attack), and Dash for repositioning (R3 bonus before Shortbow attack). Uncanny Dodge reaction is triggered in R2's monster turn using a queued guaranteed-hit dice roll. Verifies CA bonus-action economy, SA eligibility from Hidden advantage, and Uncanny Dodge halving damage.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: 3d6 extra damage with advantage or ally adjacent to target

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: Dash, Disengage, or Hide as bonus action

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.description: Halve damage from one attack as a reaction

monsters.comment: Bandit Captain with Multiattack (2 Scimitar attacks per turn). High DEX so likely acts before Bandit.
monsters.name: Bandit Captain

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The captain makes two scimitar attacks.

monsters.comment: Bandit at (10,9): adjacent to Bandit Captain at (10,10). Low stat attacker for testing.
monsters.name: Bandit

actions.comment: === ROUND 1: Attack + Cunning Action: Disengage (CA1) ===

input.text: I attack the Bandit Captain with my Rapier

actions.comment: High initiative roll so Lyra acts first.
R1 main action: attack Bandit Captain with Rapier. No SA guaranteed here (Bandit is enemy faction, not party ally).
Attack roll 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 15 — hit.
Damage roll: submit weapon die value. Server adds +4 modifier.
R1 bonus action: Cunning Action Disengage (CA1 tested). Prevents opportunity attacks on movement.
Lyra took no damage this round (Disengage prevents OA; monsters haven't attacked yet).
Queue R1 monster turns: Captain Multiattack (2 Scimitar attacks), Bandit 1 Scimitar.
End R1 — monsters act.
Wait for all monster turns to complete.
R1 aftermath: monsters may have hit (broad range; Uncanny Dodge not yet used this round).
=== ROUND 2: Cunning Action: Hide (CA2) + Sneak Attack from advantage + Uncanny Dodge ===
Verify Lyra has the Hidden condition after Cunning Action: Hide. Stealth 10 vs passive perception 10.
R2 main action: attack Bandit Captain with Rapier while hidden (advantage). SA eligible via advantage.
Attack roll 15 + 7 = 22 vs AC 15 — hit. Advantage from Hidden state.
Damage roll: player submits combined weapon + Sneak Attack dice (1d8 + 3d6). Server adds +4.
Queue a guaranteed-hit die roll (18) so the Captain's first Scimitar attack will hit Lyra and trigger Uncanny Dodge eligibility.
Queue R2 monster turns: Captain Multiattack (2 Scimitar) + Bandit Scimitar. First Captain roll uses queued 18 (18+5=23 vs AC 15 = hit).
End R2 — Captain's guaranteed hit triggers Uncanny Dodge prompt.
Wait for the server to pause on Uncanny Dodge reaction (Captain's first Scimitar hits with the queued 18).
Use Uncanny Dodge reaction to halve the incoming damage (CA2 + Uncanny Dodge tested).
Wait for remaining monster turns (Captain's 2nd attack + Bandit) to complete.
R2 aftermath: Uncanny Dodge halved the first hit. HP range is broad due to remaining monster attacks.
=== ROUND 3: Cunning Action: Dash (CA3) + Shortbow ranged attack ===
R3 main action: Shortbow attack on Bandit Captain from range (tests ranged attack after Dash repositioning).
Attack roll 12 + 7 = 19 vs AC 15 — hit.
Damage: 1d6 weapon die + 4 modifier.
Queue R3 monster turns: Captain Multiattack (if alive) + Bandit.
End R3.
Wait for monster turns.
R3 aftermath: three Cunning Actions tested (Disengage, Hide, Dash). HP still viable.
=== ROUND 4: Final verification attack ===
Attack roll 16 + 7 = 23 vs AC 15 — hit.
Damage roll.
Final state check: combat still active, Bandit Captain has taken cumulative damage across all 4 rounds.
